transcript: Good afternoon everyone, I'm David, I'm the CEO and co-founder of Triad. Um, so prediction markets are exploding right now. Kalshi and Polymarket are raising billions of dollars and getting all the attention in the US. But who cares about the US? So we are in LatAm, so we have big chaos. We have big chaos, we have the better memes, the real betting culture. And while everyone is staring at Washington, we are building the first prediction market in Brazil. And I started this with my cousin and my brother, um, because prediction markets shouldn't be like boring finance dashboards. They should feel like ESPN, TikTok, or Solana. And, actually, what we are doing is... we are onboarding Web2 users at scale. We just did like Pix on and off ramp. Uh, we did like... it's simple, so anybody can... from Web2 can use our platform. So, like few weeks ago, uh, we just ran some live streams in the... in the platform. Not on YouTube, not on Twitch, inside the platform. So we got like 200,000 people watching the live simultaneously. The streamers like reacting in the markets. So it was crazy. And we are going to be the first prediction market to launch the on-chain parlays. Not Polymarket, not Kalshi, uh, did that. So we are going to be the first. So everyone can bet like, for example, Brazil to win, um, with three goals and two red flags, for example. They put a small amount and then they receive a... a huge return. So Triad Markets today, are with like 30 million dollars in accumulated volume, USDC market, uh, order book fully on-chain, and Web2 user friendly. So thank you.

sources.title: Introducing Drift v3: Built to Outperform  | Drift Updates
sources.snippet:
Introducing Drift v3: Built to Outperform  | Drift Updates
[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6310e7dee49f0866da8eed4c/6867a1f64ca2c75f0d14f371_16c97ce9017b907297827c5113a068f9_Frame%201597880158.avif)](https://www.drift.trade/)

Launch App
](#)
## Introducing Drift v3: Built to Outperform
December 4, 2025
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6310e7dee49f08e5798eed50/693023e13e4b72ada17e0fe2_2025-12-03%2017.19.13.jpg)
[
Contents
](#)
[
Contents
](#)
[
](https://twitter.com/driftprotocol)[
](https://discord.com/invite/fMcZBH8ErM)
[
Trade Now
](https://app.drift.trade/)
![]()
![]()
Drift v3 is the protocol’s biggest performance upgrade yet. Rebuilt around trader execution, v3 delivers**10x faster fills, 10x improved liquidity, and a cleaner, more intuitive interface**than v2.
This upgrade was built for one thing: outperformance. Instant execution. Deeper liquidity. A suite of tools that helps you trade faster and with more confidence.
Drift v2 was the first to bring cross-margin and multi-asset collateral to DeFi on-chain trading. We built on Solana to deliver NASDAQ-level performance on-chain and with major Solana upgrades like Alpenglow, Firedancer and Jito’s Block Assembly Market (BAM), Drift is built to outperform as the network scales.
Since launch, Drift has surpassed 1.5B in TVL, $133B+ in total trading volume and $650M in open interest. Drift v3 is built to take those numbers and your trading even further.
**Drift v3 will be available on Dec 4, 2025.**New users will need an invite code to access Drift v3.
**DM**[**@DriftProtocol**](https://x.com/DriftProtocol)**to request access.**
## Why v3?
Drift v3 represents the protocol’s next stage of maturity: the point where years of infrastructure, liquidity, and execution improvements converge into a faster, clearer, more reliable trading experience.
**Over the past year, Drift has evolved in three critical areas:**
1. Execution speed
2. Liquidity depth
3. Trader experience## How Drift v3 outperforms
*The road to v3 was focused on improving liquidity, trading execution and speed. Here’s what that looks like in practice:*
### **Trading Execution and Speed**
* **10x faster order fills:**On Drift v3, 85% of market orders are filled within the same slot. A slot is Solana’s smallest time unit (about 400 milliseconds). On Drift, that means that trades are executed in under half a second. Instant execution.
* **15x faster take profit/stop loss triggers:**For BTC, it dropped from 15 slots (\~6 seconds) to 1 slot (\~0.4 seconds). This means your risk controls and exits now trigger immediately, reducing slippage and missed opportunities.
* **Gasless trading by default:**Unlike other DEXs, where you pay gas on every trade, Drift abstracts gas fees so that’s one less thing to worry about eating into profits
* **400ms oracle updates**: Prices update every 400 millisecond (roughly 2.5 times per second). This keeps quotes accurate and reduces the chance of stale pricing.
* **Scales with Solana:**As Solana increases block size and throughput, Drift automatically gets faster too, handling more trades per second.### **Liquidity**
* **10x reduction in slippage on market orders:**In Drift v2, large market orders could move the price by 20 bps. In v3, that’s been cut to just 2 bps. Traders now get far better pricing, especially on size.
* **5x tighter TP/SL execution:**Take-profit and stop-loss orders are far more precise. On major markets like SOL and BTC, fills are 4x tighter, while non-majors see up to 5x improvement. This means exits trigger closer to the price you set, reducing losses and protecting gains.
* **Introduction of Drift Liquidity Provider (DLP)**: Provides liquidity for both Perps and Spot markets. Community members can deposit funds into DLP to support market-making and earn a share of the pool's profits. Currently in the testing stage. Public launch in Q1 2026.
* **Expanded Market Maker Program:**With v3’s expanded market maker initiatives, long-tail altcoins now hav

##### Announcements
# Introducing Predictions in Trust Wallet: Earn On Real-World Outcomes
Published on:Dec 2, 2025Updated on:Dec 4, 2025
##### Share post
[](https://www.facebook.com/sharer/sharer.php?u=https://trustwallet.com//blog/announcements/introducing-predictions-in-trust-wallet)[]()[]()[]()[]()[](/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#)
##### In Brief
Explore real-world events on-chain with Predictions in Trust Wallet. View markets, take positions and track outcomes in self-custody.
![Introducing Predictions in Trust Wallet: Earn On Real-World Outcomes](/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fstrapi-cdn.trustwallet.com%2Fintroducing_predictions_in_trust_wallet_2_cf0701cf5a.png&w=3840&q=75)
We’re excited to introduce**Predictions in Trust Wallet**, a new wallet-native way to trade and earn on real-world events with full self-custody. Eligible users can view events, take positions on outcomes such as YES or NO and track how each event develops over time, all within their existing Trust Wallet.
**This introduces a new category of on-chain experiences inside a web3 wallet**. Through our integration with leading events markets providers, including**Myriad**live on December 2nd, users can explore the most popular markets tied to crypto milestones, politics, sports, global trends and more. Each market includes tokenized outcomes that reflect how the community is pricing each possibility, and everything appears on the Swaps page under a single, easy-to-browse tab called ‘Predictions’.
### How Predictions work and how to use them in Trust Wallet
Predictions don’t require a new app. In fact, it’s a new tab inside your existing wallet experience, designed to feel familiar, simple, and mobile-native.
Inside the Predictions tab on the Swaps page, eligible users can:
* Browse real-world events curated from integrated partners
* View YES/NO or non-binary outcomes for each event
* See real-time pricing and sentiment supplied by the vendor
* Track outcomes and event resolution directly from the wallet
* Hold everything fully on-chain in self-custody
#### Getting started
Before you jump in, make sure you have the latest version of Trust Wallet.[Download Trust Wallet](https://short.trustwallet.com/TW-SEOblog)
* Open the Trust Wallet app
* Access Predictions via the Swap menu option, and ensure the Predictions tab is selected.
* Search for the Prediction you’d like to trade on in any number of categories.
* Select Yes or No to predict, and then choose your amount.
* Select Buy to complete the process.
* Once done, view your trade history or share your wins.
![predict-flow.png](/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fstrapi-cdn.trustwallet.com%2Fpredict_flow_6a8c80ee8e.png&w=3840&q=75)
### The Predictions launch providers
To introduce Predictions responsibly and at scale, we s

tags.impact_reason: While innovative for the LatAm market and onboarding Web2 users, prediction markets are a relatively niche DeFi application on Solana, limiting its overall impact.

visual_idea.reasoning: I chose interconnected, glowing dominoes as the Semantic Anchor because they perfectly represent a 'parlay' bet—a chain reaction where multiple events must occur in sequence for a single outcome. This visual metaphor captures the high-stakes, cause-and-effect nature of Triad's core product. I included the diegetic text 'BRA +3' and 'RED x2' as holographic overlays on the dominoes to directly reference the betting culture and specific parlay examples mentioned in the transcript, making the abstract concept tangible and rooted in the sports betting world of Brazil.
visual_idea.description: A macro 1:1 square shot focusing on the critical gap between two glowing acrylic dominoes. The first domino, filling the left of the frame, is just about to tip the second. The focus is on the intensely bright, refracted light passing through the translucent material, revealing subtle internal etches and imperfections. The reflection of the second domino is warped on the polished surface of the first. The background is a soft, out-of-focus bokeh of other glowing dominoes in the chain, conveying imminent energy transfer.

final_prompt.prompt_text: A macro 1:1 square shot focusing on the critical gap between two glowing translucent acrylic dominoes. The first domino, intensely glowing with volumetric neon light and filling the left of the frame, is poised just about to tip the second. The composition emphasizes tight macro framing and central focus on the intensely bright, refracted volumetric neon light passing through the translucent acrylic material, revealing subtle internal etches and imperfections with extreme clarity. The surface beneath the dominoes is a highly reflective, polished concrete, casting a warped reflection of the second domino onto the first, filling the lower frame with texture. The background is a soft, out-of-focus bokeh of other glowing translucent acrylic dominoes in the chain, creating a deep field of vibrant volumetric neon light, conveying imminent energy transfer and a sense of a digital gambit. The scene is illuminated with dramatic volumetric neon lighting, creating strong specular highlights and high contrast. 8k, octane render, raytracing, hyper-detailed, extreme_ultra_detail, high-end visualization, product photography, global illumination, studio lighting, photographic.

editorial.headline: Triad Markets Targets LatAm with First On-Chain Parlays
editorial.standfirst: Bypassing the US regulatory gridlock, Triad leverages Brazil's betting culture and native Pix payments to scale decentralized prediction markets. The protocol claims a sector-first with the upcoming launch of fully on-chain parlay bets, positioning itself against incumbents like Polymarket.
key_takeaways: $30 million in accumulated volume with a fully on-chain order book.
200,000 concurrent viewers achieved during in-app live stream events.
First prediction market to launch on-chain parlays, enabling multi-leg high-variance bets.
editorial.article_body_markdown:
While the majority of the prediction market narrative focuses on US elections and Washington regulation, **Triad Markets** is executing a contrarian thesis: "Who cares about the US?" CEO **Davi Cardoso** argues that Latin America, specifically Brazil, offers a superior product-market fit due to a cultural affinity for volatility and betting, which he describes as "big chaos." By focusing on this region, Triad avoids the regulatory headwinds facing **Kalshi** and **Polymarket** while tapping into a highly active retail user base.

Triad's growth strategy relies on abstracting Web3 complexity to compete with Web2 sportsbooks. The platform integrates **Pix**, Brazil's instant payment system, allowing for seamless fiat on-ramps that bypass traditional crypto wallet friction. Furthermore, Triad has embedded live streaming directly into the trading interface—a feature that recently drove 200,000 simultaneous viewers. This "TikTok meets ESPN" approach shifts prediction markets from solitary financial speculation to a social, entertainment-driven experience.

The technical "Alpha" revealed at Breakpoint is the introduction of on-chain parlays. Parlays (multi-leg bets) are a staple of traditional sports gambling due to their high margins for the house and lottery-ticket appeal for bettors. Implementing this on-chain is computationally intensive, requiring high-speed order book updates that only high-throughput chains like **Solana** can support. By enabling users to compound bets (e.g., "Brazil wins + 3 goals + 2 red cards"), Triad is introducing a high-velocity product that current AMM-based prediction markets struggle to offer.

With $30 million in accumulated volume and a fully on-chain order book, Triad is moving beyond the proof-of-concept phase. The platform's ability to settle bets in **USDC** while maintaining the user experience of a Web2 app suggests a viable path for institutional-grade prediction markets to scale in emerging markets, independent of US regulatory clarity.
